title: Flavorful Light Indian Mushroom Lassi
description: A peppery and light Indian-inspired drink featuring roasted mushrooms, this vegan-friendly lassi is a unique twist on traditional Indian cuisine. It combines the earthy flavor of mushrooms with the creamy texture of a lassi.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Toss the mushrooms with a little water and roast in the oven for 15 minutes, or until they are tender and lightly browned.
Allow the mushrooms to cool, then blend them with the non-dairy yogurt, cucumber, cumin powder, coriander powder, cayenne pepper, and salt until smooth.
Add the water to the blender and continue blending until the mixture is well combined.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Pour the lassi into glasses and garnish with chopped fresh cilantro.
Refrigerate any leftovers and consume within a day.
